subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who art the Sovereign of the earthly kingdom and the celestial realm, and the Lord of the dominion of power! I beseech Thee by the heart of the world which Thou hast made the Qiblih [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مالک الملک و الملکوت و سلطان الجبروت اسئلک بقلب العالم الذی جعلته قبله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for fasting, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
